summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
raw_articles.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

raw_articles.title: Cybersecurity stocks rally on AI spending change comments from IBM's Krishna
raw_articles.summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna told CNBC's Sara Eisen that some major deals were put on hold toward the end of the quarter as businesses rethink spending.

raw_articles.title: Current and former employees sue Meta, alleging discrimination in using AI to conduct layoffs
raw_articles.summary: The lawsuit filed by current and former Meta employees underscores rising concerns about AI's impact on jobs and people with disabilities in the workforce.

raw_articles.title: Zipline adds ex-Tesla, Uber, Waymo execs to make drone delivery mainstream across U.S.
raw_articles.summary: Zipline is growing its drone delivery business in the U.S., and has hired former Tesla, Uber Eats and Waymo executives to help it scale up in new markets.

raw_articles.title: I've used the iOS 27 beta for a month: 7 ways the new Siri is dramatically better
raw_articles.summary: Siri AI is the star of iOS 27, and now most iPhone users can try it with the first public beta of the OS.

raw_articles.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
raw_articles.summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

raw_articles.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
raw_articles.summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

raw_articles.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
raw_articles.summary: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

raw_articles.title: New York becomes first U.S. state to impose AI data center ban
raw_articles.summary: New York became the first state to ban construction of 'hyperscale' AI data centers, for one year, after Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an executive order Tuesday.

raw_articles.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
raw_articles.summary: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

raw_articles.title: Apple in talks with startup that shrinks AI models to run on an iPhone
raw_articles.summary: PrismML says its compressed version of Alibaba’s Qwen model uses up to 15 times less memory, potentially advancing Apple’s AI push.

raw_articles.title: Every iPhone model that supports iOS 27 (and which older ones don't)
raw_articles.summary: Here's a breakdown of which iPhone models support the next iOS update (now available on public beta) - and which ones Apple is leaving behind.

raw_articles.title: What is Meta Prompting and How does it work?
raw_articles.summary:
Prompts shape every interaction with a large language model. Clear instructions produce focused, useful responses, while vague ones often lead to inconsistent results. This becomes harder when teams need the same task completed repeatedly in a fixed format, tone, or structure. Meta-prompting asks the model to design a reusable prompt, template, checklist, or workflow before […]
The post What is Meta Prompting and How does it work? appeared first on Analytics Vidhya.

raw_articles.title: Google is training AI on even more of your data now, unless you opt out - here's how
raw_articles.summary: Images, videos and voice searches can be used to train Google's LLMs. You can disable this feature to retain your privacy.

raw_articles.title: Oracle Focuses on Fusion App Developers With Agentic AI Tools
raw_articles.summary: The hyperscaler continues to build out its agentic platform as it deepens its AI capabilities.
